description: Manifest of current reference data versions. Bahi and other .khata implementations fetch this file to check for updates and verify dataset hashes.

gst-rates.note: Rate bands only; HSN-to-rate assignments are in the hsn dataset

hsn-common.note: Starter set only. Production release requires a curated top-2000 HSN set from CBIC sources.

hsn-full.note: Full ~15K HSN set to be published after sourcing from CBIC

sac.note: Starter set of major service categories; needs expansion

challan-templates.note: Most common challans; more state-specific forms to follow

notes: SHA-256 hashes are placeholders ('TO_BE_COMPUTED_ON_PUBLISH') and will be populated by the GitHub Action that publishes to the CDN.

Status values: 'stable' means the dataset is accurate and ready for use; 'starter' means a reasonable initial set that should be reviewed and expanded; 'placeholder' means a structural skeleton that must be replaced before production use.
Bahi should treat 'placeholder' datasets with extra caution — surface to the user that the data is incomplete and they should exercise judgment on values not covered by the bundled set.
